name: aa-cq-reports
description: Comprehensive reporting solution for Teams AA-CQ

scripts.generate:sample-reports: node src/index.js data/sample-cq.csv --source cq --format html --out reports/cq-summary.html && node src/index.js data/sample-cq.csv --source cq --format json --out reports/cq-summary.json && node src/index.js data/sample-cq.csv --source cq --format xls --out reports/cq-summary.xls && node src/index.js data/sample-cq.csv --source cq --format xlsx --out reports/cq-summary.xlsx && node src/index.js data/sample-cq.csv --source cq --format pdf --out reports/cq-summary.pdf && node src/index.js data/sample-aa.csv --source aa --format html --out reports/aa-summary.html && node src/index.js data/sample-aa.csv --source aa --format csv --out reports/aa-summary.csv && node src/index.js data/sample-aa.csv --source aa --format xls --out reports/aa-summary.xls && node src/index.js data/sample-aa.csv --source aa --format xlsx --out reports/aa-summary.xlsx && node src/index.js data/sample-aa.csv --source aa --format pdf --out reports/aa-summary.pdf
scripts.lint: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/csv-reader.js && node --check src/aa-reader.js && node --check src/reporter.js && node --check src/xlsx-writer.js && node --check test/index.test.js && node --check test/csv-reader.test.js && node --check test/aa-reader.test.js && node --check test/reporter.test.js
